This is CRAIG — the BUILT Craig's Castle boss (built as 'Craig the Mad Intern', 0x1fe2, with taunts 'I'M STARTING TO GET ANGRY!!!' etc.). Here titled 'Craig, The Worst Nightmare' (a title/variant) with NEW trick/mocking-themed taunts. ENRICHES the Craig build (Craig's Castle is a flagged high-priority dungeon).

But my next trick...', 'fix that problem with some gain!') — Craig the Mad Intern / 'Craig, The Worst Nightmare' enrichment for the built Craig's Castle boss.
